programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: After a young woman vanishes on her way to work, police desperately follow a trail of videotaped clues they hope will solve a complex mystery; the evidence found inside her car could be the key to solving the brazen abduction.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police investigating the murder of a young woman start to wonder if the ambush-style shooting that ended the victim's life resulted from a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.desc: A mother notices that her son is dark and detached and occasionally reveals to her fantasies of violence towards his own family. She begins to wonder if her once-happy, sweet boy is evil, but could never imagine the true terror her son would become.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective
programme.desc: A murder victim's lost dog becomes the key clue in solving her murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Before They Kill Again
programme.desc: When a Mother's Day killing horrifies a town, investigators discover the psychopath has struck before; realizing that any woman could be his next victim, predicting the killer's next move hinges on understanding what motivates a monster.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Before They Kill Again
programme.desc: As Washington, DC burns, police realise they are hunting the most prolific arsonist in US history, and he has been getting away with it for decades.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Devil in the Web
programme.desc: Andy Castillo uses the internet to call and text female realtors in 20 different states; wielding their social media against them, he makes the women believe he's lurking nearby, adding to their terror.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Devil in the Web
programme.desc: Online cult leader Sherry Shriner reaches her followers through YouTube videos and keeps them in line via her Facebook page; when a group member dies in a tragic shooting, attention turns to Sherry and the control she wields over her followers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Devil in the Web
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old Aubrey Peal uses an app to find others interested in gaming; he strikes up an online friendship with a man named Jason, who claims he is suicidal; concerned, Aubrey agrees to meet Jason, not realizing his evil intentions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Devil in the Web
programme.desc: CeCe bonds with a man she meets on a dating app and she happily obliges when he asks her for money for his business, but she becomes yet another victim of a romance scam.

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: Stunning actress Victoria Vetri becomes Playmate of the Year in 1968; just a year later, followers of Charles Manson brutally murder her close friend Sharon Tate; the crime sets in motion a series of events that ends in Victoria's tragic downfall.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: After she's fired from the police department, 19-year-old Laurie Bembenek becomes a Playboy Bunny; when her new husband's ex-wife dies, Laurie is painted as a femme fatale and convicted of murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: In the late '90s, Playboy twins Sandy and Mandy Bentley's fame soars until an affair with a Vegas High Roller leads to a fall from fame, stolen jewels, a shadowy buyer and a brutal double murder in the Hollywood hills.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: A 19-year-old is discovered in Canada; after becoming "Playmate of the Year," her husband sees dollar signs, but as her star rises, she's drawn to another man; afraid of losing his meal ticket, her husband shoots them in their home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: An aspiring model, Kimberly Pandelios, accepts an offer to pose in lingerie for a mysterious photographer, then disappears; years later, a young woman contacts the police when she begins to suspect that her boyfriend may have been the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: A missing person's report sends investigators on a desperate search through the seedy underbelly of the Floribama panhandle; all roads lead to a once sought-after porn star, whose fate is revealed when an informant comes forward to unearth the truth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: When detectives respond to a 911 call from a lavish Miami apartment, they uncover a bloody scene with a popular social media influencer at the center; as they piece events together, soon it gets clear that a lot is going on behind closed doors.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: All-American Midwestern hunk Timothy Boham's innocent modeling career catapults him into porn industry stardom; when Tim tries to escape the vicious cycle of selling his body for money, running from his past proves to be deadly.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: A single mother turns to exotic dancing to support her family; as she becomes successful, the temptation to make much more money leads to lies with devastating consequences; faced with an uncertain future, she stabs and kills her boyfriend.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Anneka Di Lorenzo finds fame as a successful model in Penthouse Magazine and secures a part in the movie "Caligula"; however, her life eventually unravels with tragic consequences.

programme.desc: "Survivor" contestant Joe Hunter says his sister, whose death was officially ruled a suicide, was murdered.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade
programme.desc: Stockbroker Joe Pikul and his wife, Diane, are living the high life, then Diane discovers Joe's been leading a double life, and within days of the stock market crash on Black Monday in 1987, their marriage comes to a violent end.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade
programme.desc: Single mother Linda Culbertson lands a dream job as a legal secretary in a Kansas City, Mo., law firm, and falls hard for her married boss, Donald Pierce; the fallout is deadly as Culbertson draws bystanders into a shocking and vicious crime.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: When the perpetrator of a brutal shooting claims no randomness to his murders, a prosecutor must untangle fact from fiction.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: A landlord in Birmingham, Ala., approaches his rental home to inspect a broken window when he suddenly hears a baby crying, but what he discovers inside will haunt two families for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: After a savage beating that nearly kills a young mother, Omaha investigators learn that she's not the only victim; they launch a relentless search for the killer and quickly realize their most crucial clue might die with their victim.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: In 1996, a Wyoming college student leaves a dorm party and gets a ride from the wrong classmate, vanishing into the night; police scramble to find her before sunrise.

programme.title: Married to Evil
programme.desc: Police officer Andy Kimbrel hopes to find happiness with new wife, Stephanie Keller, but when the marriage starts to fail, Andy falls victim to manipulation and violence; a fierce argument leads to tragedy, and police suspect something more.

programme.title: Married to Evil
programme.desc: When Stacy Malman and Robert Feldman fall in love, it's a dream come true; behind closed doors, life becomes a living hell; one night, a knock at the door forces the couple to confront the truth and triggers a series of events ending in horror.

programme.title: Married to Evil
programme.desc: Jessica Jaramillo escapes her abusive ex-husband, Chad Graves, but a joint custody agreement for her children means he will always be in their lives; his increasingly obsessive behavior reveals he is not who he presents himself to be.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: He Brought Roses and a Gun
programme.desc: Andrea believes that Ray Clark is the man of her dreams; but when she reveals she's pregnant, Ray becomes a nightmare; he stalks her and tortures their infant son; Andrea and her baby narrowly escape, but the next woman Ray meets isn't so lucky.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.desc: Jeannette does everything she can to care for her son, Timmy; everything is going well until his dark side emerges and he becomes violent and dangerous; despite every effort to help her son, she watches helplessly as he spirals into darkness.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: After a wife calls 911 to report her husband missing, police discover his lifeless body in his car, parked inside a corporate parking garage.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A man confesses to accidentally killing his best friend while cleaning his gun; during his interrogation, he stuns police by revealing that he's behind a long trail of bloodshed and is a serial killer who seems to consider himself an angel of mercy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.sub-title: He Didn't Know I Was There
programme.desc: A gunman shoots a man dead as he runs along a country road, and first responders find a witness standing next to the body with a strange story to tell; detectives unravel the lies of a callous psychopath who takes out his frustrations in bloodshed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.desc: Jeannette does everything she can to care for her son, Timmy; everything is going well until his dark side emerges and he becomes violent and dangerous; despite every effort to help her son, she watches helplessly as he spirals into darkness.
